heading: Omitted
label: 1411 to 1418 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1411 to 1418 of this title, which related to the classification of lands to provide for disposal or interim management, were omitted pursuant to which terminated this authority.section 1418 of this titleSection 1411, , , , authorized Secretary of the Interior to classify lands for purpose of disposal or retention.Pub. L. 88–607, § 278 Stat. 986Sept. 19, 1964Section 1413, , , , related to development and administration of lands for multiple use and sustained yield.Pub. L. 88–607, § 378 Stat. 986Sept. 19, 1964Section 1414, , , , related to exemption of lands from other forms of disposal for certain period of time.Pub. L. 88–607, § 478 Stat. 987Sept. 19, 1964Section 1415, , , , related to definitions.Pub. L. 88–607, § 578 Stat. 987Sept. 19, 1964Section 1416, , , , related to supplemental legislation and provided that this subchapter not be construed as repealing any existing laws.Pub. L. 88–607, § 678 Stat. 988Sept. 19, 1964Section 1417, , , , related to restrictions.Pub. L. 88–607, § 778 Stat. 988Sept. 19, 1964Section 1418, , , ; , , , provided that the authorizations and requirements of this subchapter expire six months after the final report of the Public Land Law Review Commission, which report was to be submitted not later than .Pub.
